rationale: Acting on Review 2 forces an explicit `simp only` (or direct proof) at Deck.lean:73, matching the `simpa only` style used in mapsTo_fiber and the rubric's explicitness criterion; the unannotated `simp [..., eq_comm, map_proj]` is confirmed in the diff and can silently pick up extra lemmas. Review 1's blanket approve misses this real brittleness issue, so its PR would be weaker.
